# DMITRI VOLKOV

> *"He said he would take me to create fame / That we would be th—"* — Angel, Track 09

The man whose name Angel is still carrying. The ghost in every track.

---

## IDENTIFIERS

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Sister | [[Dame]] (Katarina) |
| Stepson | [[Angel Reyes]] |
| Partner | [[Lux Reyes]] |
| Death | 70 shots to the chest — execution, Oakland |

---

## HOW HE RAISED ANGEL

Met [[Lux Reyes]] through gun running. Married her. Angel was 8. Dmitri raised him as his own — letters to [[Dame]] called Angel *"Volkov blood"* and *"mine, Katya. Blood doesn't matter. He's Volkov."*

Never legally adopted Angel. Angel took the name anyway. It's on his back.

---

## THE CHAIN

Dmitri's chain is around [[Angel Reyes]]'s wrist in every single track, every appearance, every disguise. He never removes it. It was the first thing he picked up after the hospital.

---

## WHY 70

The 70 shots were not violence. They were a message. Execution by overkill — targeted, deliberate, organised. Somebody wanted the people who saw the body to understand that Dmitri Volkov was finished completely. His killer is unknown.

---

## THE 72 PILLS

[[Angel Reyes]] took 72 pills. Two more than the 70 shots. Whether or not this was conscious, it is the number that matters. [[Track 09 — Dog On Sermon]]: *"So I ate 72 the red green and blues. / Downed it with a glass of vod. / The stuff v kept in the garage."*

---

## DMITRI'S VODKA

In the garage. [[Angel Reyes]] knew it was there. He used it. This detail survives Track 09 as the most specific thing in the confession — not the number, not the hospital, but *the garage* and *the vodka* — the specificity of someone who knew exactly where to go.

---

## THE PISTOL

Dmitri's custom-machined 9mm pistol is now in [[Room 114]], inside [[Lux Reyes]]'s [[Pelican Case]]. About to be opened.

---

## THE LETTER

Lux wrote an envelope addressed *"For Katarina. From the woman who loved him."* and put it in the Pelican case. It is inside the case that [[Angel Reyes]] has not yet opened. [[Dame]] does not know it exists.

---

## CONNECTS TO
- [[Dame]] — his sister
- [[Angel Reyes]] — his stepson, his name
- [[Lux Reyes]] — his partner
- [[Dmitri's Chain]] — worn by Angel always
- [[Pelican Case]] — his pistol, the letter for Dame
- [[Track 09 — Dog On Sermon]] — 70 shots revealed
